_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored.

google._comment: Create OAuth credentials at console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop app)

elevenlabs._comment: Get your API key at elevenlabs.io → Profile. Voice ID from your voice library.

deployment._comment: Your GitHub repo in the format username/repo-name
